import React,{useState,useEffect,useMemo}from'react';import{Link}from'react-router-dom';import{useTranslation}from'react-i18next';import certificatesData from'../data/certificate-data';import CertificateGenerator from'../services/CertificateGenerator';import{jsPDF}from'jspdf';import ImageWithFallback from'./shared/ImageWithFallback';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs,Fragment as _Fragment}from"react/jsx-runtime";const CertificatesPage=()=>{const{t,i18n}=useTranslation();const[searchTerm,setSearchTerm]=useState('');const[selectedCertificate,setSelectedCertificate]=useState(null);const[processedCertificates,setProcessedCertificates]=useState([]);const[isDownloading,setIsDownloading]=useState(false);const[downloadStatus,setDownloadStatus]=useState({certificateId:null,status:null,message:''});const currentLanguage=i18n.language;const isEnglish=currentLanguage==='en'||currentLanguage.startsWith('en-');// 处理SVG证书
useEffect(()=>{// 为每个证书创建处理后的图像URL
const processCertificates=async()=>{// 显示加载状态
const emptyProcessed=certificatesData.map(cert=>({...cert,processedImage:null,isLoading:true}));setProcessedCertificates(emptyProcessed);const processed=await Promise.all(certificatesData.map(async cert=>{try{// 获取SVG模板
const response=await fetch(cert.image);if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to load certificate template');let svgText=await response.text();// 对姓名和课程名称进行编码，防止XML注入和特殊字符问题
const encodedName=cert.name.replace(/&/g,'&').replace(/</g,'<').replace(/>/g,'>');const encodedCourse=isEnglish&&cert.english_course?cert.english_course.replace(/&/g,'&').replace(/</g,'<').replace(/>/g,'>'):cert.course.replace(/&/g,'&').replace(/</g,'<').replace(/>/g,'>');const encodedDescription=isEnglish&&cert.english_description?cert.english_description:'';// 替换占位符
svgText=svgText.replace(/\[RECIPIENT NAME\]/g,encodedName);svgText=svgText.replace(/\[DATE\]/g,cert.date);svgText=svgText.replace(/\[CERTIFICATE-ID\]/g,cert.certificateId);svgText=svgText.replace(/\[PROGRAM\/DEGREE\]/g,encodedCourse);svgText=svgText.replace(/\[PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION\]/g,encodedDescription);svgText=svgText.replace(/\[HASH\]/g,'SIU-'+Math.random().toString(36).substring(2,10).toUpperCase());// 创建Blob和URL
const blob=new Blob([svgText],{type:'image/svg+xml'});const url=URL.createObjectURL(blob);return{...cert,processedImage:url,isLoading:false};}catch(error){console.error('Error processing certificate:',error);return{...cert,processedImage:cert.image,isLoading:false,error:true};}}));setProcessedCertificates(processed);};processCertificates();// 清理函数
return()=>{// 释放创建的对象URL
processedCertificates.forEach(cert=>{if(cert.processedImage&&cert.processedImage.startsWith('blob:')){URL.revokeObjectURL(cert.processedImage);}});};},[isEnglish]);// 搜索筛选逻辑
const filteredCertificates=processedCertificates.filter(cert=>cert.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase())||(isEnglish&&cert.english_course?cert.english_course.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()):cert.course.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()))||cert.certificateId.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()));// 选择证书查看详情
const handleCertificateClick=certificate=>{setSelectedCertificate(certificate);};// 关闭证书详情模态框
const closeModal=()=>{setSelectedCertificate(null);};// 下载证书
const downloadCertificate=async(certificate,e)=>{e.stopPropagation();// 防止触发模态框
try{setIsDownloading(true);setDownloadStatus({certificateId:certificate.certificateId,status:'downloading',message:t('certificatesPage.downloadingMessage')});const success=await CertificateGenerator.downloadCertificate(certificate);if(success){setDownloadStatus({certificateId:certificate.certificateId,status:'success',message:t('certificatesPage.downloadSuccess')});// 3秒后重置状态
setTimeout(()=>{setDownloadStatus({certificateId:null,status:null,message:''});},3000);}else{throw new Error('Download failed');}}catch(error){console.error('Download error:',error);setDownloadStatus({certificateId:certificate.certificateId,status:'error',message:t('certificatesPage.downloadError')});// 3秒后重置错误状态
setTimeout(()=>{setDownloadStatus({certificateId:null,status:null,message:''});},3000);}finally{setIsDownloading(false);}};// 格式化发布日期
const formatDate=dateString=>{const options={year:'numeric',month:'long',day:'numeric'};return new Date(dateString).toLocaleDateString(isEnglish?'en-US':'zh-CN',options);};// 根据当前语言获取课程名称
const getCourseTitle=certificate=>{return isEnglish&&certificate.english_course?certificate.english_course:certificate.course;};// 根据当前语言获取课程描述
const getCourseDescription=certificate=>{return
